title: pi-context pi-bound: launch a pi session bound to the composed extension tool surface
description: A globally-runnable `pi-context pi-bound` command launches an interactive pi session restricted to the composed extension tool surface — the static SKILL.md tool union plus the config-declared per-target composites — reproducing scripts/launch-constrained-pi.sh as a first-class CLI command and subsuming it.
motivation: The constrained-launch capability exists only as an out-of-tree shell script that needs the repo checkout. As a command on a globally installed pi-context, it runs from any project with the published packages present.
